conservative.name: Scrutinise
conservative.requirements: You must be able to see and hear the target clearly

success.description: You learn one significant fact about the target, for example its highest characteristic, most potent attack or action, or a relevant story detail at the GM's discretion

boon.description: While this card is recharging, add to all your actions against the same target

bane.description: Your target gleans a similar insight into you and adds to all checks that target you while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: You gain valuable insights into the target. While this card is recharging, you may perform 1 free manoeuvre immediately after the target's turn

reckless.name: Scrutinise
reckless.requirements: You must be able to see and hear the targets clearly

success.description: You learn one significant fact about the target, for example its highest characteristic, most potent attack or action, or a relevant story detail at the GM's discretion
As above, plus you may immediately attempt a Social action against the target. Add to your dice pool for that action

bane.description: Your target gleans a similar insight into you and adds to all checks that target you while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: You gain valuable insights into the target. While this card is recharging, you many perform a manoeuvre each time the target does
